players.name: Willy Guggenheim
matchupItemFlags: no armor vs a 3-physical enemy comp

notes: Their main damage was Kira (41k physical); 2/5 of us itemized armor.
Enemy ran 1/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

🎮 private (carry) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
Goldilocks324 (support) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-2 into a numbers advantage.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.0s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Grux. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
synergy: Little hard CC on our side — we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
ourKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
ourKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
ourKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
ourKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Lash Kick gap-close+slow → Windburn %hp basics → Backlash push, Quelling Gale to disengage
ourKits.passive: Rising Storm stacks grant attack speed
ourKits.playWith: a team that lets her side-lane and pick
ourKits.playAgainst: she wants 1v1s — group and burst her; Quelling Gale only stops projectiles

ourKits.combo: Phantom Rush → Subjugate root → Siphon → Colossal Blow
ourKits.winCondition: stack Souls to snowball Siphon and lock down with the root
ourKits.passive: ability kills grant permanent Soul stacks (HP + damage)
ourKits.playWith: a team that converts his root into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: deny his last-hits early to starve Souls; dodge the slow Subjugate

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Mercy poke → stack Vengeance → Shadow Glide reposition → Purge ult
enemyKits.winCondition: stack Vengeance and shred with the channeled Purge
enemyKits.playWith: peel so she can channel Purge safely
enemyKits.playAgainst: interrupt/CC her during Purge; punish her short dash cooldown

enemyKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
enemyKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

enemyKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
enemyKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
enemyKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
